data.title: Solitron Devices, Inc. shares fiscal 2026 Q2 results, pleasing the Company. Oct. 10, 2025 news.
data.description: Solitron Devices, headquartered in West Palm Beach, Florida, disclosed their fiscal 2026 second quarter results on October 10, 2025. The company, traded under the ticker symbol SODI on OTC Pink, reported positive financial outcomes for this period.

data.title: Vera Therapeutics grants stock options and RSUs to 21 new employees - 135,100 stock options and 70,775 RSUs issued.
data.description: Vera Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: VERA) based in Brisbane, California, made an announcement on October 10, 2025, regarding the issuance of inducement awards. These awards, approved by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors, comprise non-qualified stock options for the purchase of 135,100 shares of Class A common stock and restricted stock units (RSUs) for 70,775 shares of Class A common stock. This issuance was made to twenty-one (21) new employees under the Vera Therapeutics, Inc. 2024 Inducement Plan. The awards were granted as inducements crucial to the new employees’ recruitment, as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: Vera Bradley extends shareholder rights plan, expires on Oct 11, 2026, to protect shareholder interests.
data.description: Fort Wayne-based Vera Bradley, Inc. disclosed that their Board of Directors has sanctioned an extension to the shareholder rights plan, pushing the prior deadline of October 11, 2025, to October 11, 2026. The decision was made to safeguard shareholders' interests and enhance overall value. The Rights Plan, originally set in place by the company, marked under the Nasdaq index as VRA, will uphold its existing terms and conditions with no modifications, ensuring consistency in its objectives.

data.title: Main Street Financial Services Corp. declares $0.14/share dividend for Q3 ending Sept 30, 2025, payable on Nov 7, 2025.
data.description: In Wooster, Ohio, on October 10, 2025, Main Street Financial Services Corp. (OTCQX: MSWV), the parent company of Main Street Bank Corp., has announced a cash dividend of $0.14 per share for the quarter ending September 30, 2025. This dividend is set to be distributed on November 7, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 28, 2025.

data.title: Talen Energy Corporation priced $1.40 billion in 6.250% senior notes due 2034 and $1.29 billion in 6.500% senior notes due 2036.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Talen Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: TLN) announced that its subsidiary, Talen Energy Supply, LLC, has priced offerings totaling $2.69 billion. This includes $1.40 billion in 6.250% senior notes due 2034 and $1.29 billion in 6.500% senior notes due 2036. These offerings are exempt from the registration requirements of the Securities Act of 1933. The closing of the offerings is expected to take place on October 27, 2025, subject to standard closing conditions.

data.title: Premier (OTC: PREM) reports strong quarterly results, showing growth in Hawaii and Mexico markets.
data.description: PREM (OTC ID) has reported a robust quarter, showcasing continued growth and strategic advancement in key sectors.

data.title: LendingTree, Inc. to report Q3 2025 earnings on October 30th. Important numbers: Stock symbol - NASDAQ: TREE.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - October 10, 2025 - LendingTree, Inc., a leading online financial services marketplace, is set to disclose its fiscal third quarter 2025 results on October 30, 2025, after the market closes. The announcement will be made available to shareholders via a letter on the company's website at investors.lendingtree.com. LendingTree, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol TREE. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: RIOT stock fell on political pressure, with RIOT stock's short interest at 18.3%. Investors wary, moving to safe havens like gold amidst Trump's tariff threats on Chinese goods. Market in risky environment, but possible discounted opportunity ahead.
data.description: Blockchain mining enterprise Riot Platforms Inc (RIOT) faced a sharp decline in its stock on Friday due to political pressure, catalyzed by President Trump's social media post threatening increased tariffs on Chinese imports. This led to a broader drop in equity indices, with gold and silver prices rising. Trump's efforts to counter Chinese control over rare earths shifted investor focus to safe havens like gold, causing profit-taking in growth-oriented enterprises like RIOT, MARA Holdings Inc, and Coinbase Global Inc. RIOT's short interest currently stands at 18.3% of its float, signaling a potential discounted opportunity amidst the risky market conditions. This article discusses how political events impacted the stock market and specific companies in the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Dow Jones dives as Trump threatens Chinese tariffs hike. Big tech stocks hit hard. Market sell-off intensifies.
data.description: Following President Trump's announcement of a potential escalation in Chinese tariffs, the Dow Jones experienced a sudden and significant downturn. The stock market witnessed a deepening sell-off, particularly impacting the Dow and Nasdaq indices. Big tech companies were notably affected by the market volatility.

data.title: Major banks like Bank of America, Citi, and Goldman Sachs are reportedly exploring a joint stablecoin.
data.description: Major financial institutions such as Bank of American, Goldman Sachs, and Citi are reportedly considering the issuance of a stablecoin, as revealed in an announcement on Friday.

data.title: TrustCo Bank Corp NY to release Q3 results on Oct 21, 2025, with a conference call on Oct 22, 2025 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Participants can dial 1-833-470-1428 (US) or 1-833-950-0062 (Canada) for the call, access code 142665, with a replay available for 30 days by dialing 1-866-813-9403, access code 156241.
data.description: GLENVILLE, NY, 10/10/2025 - TrustCo Bank Corp NY (TrustCo, Nasdaq: TRST) disclosed that their Q3 2025 results will be made public after market close on Oct 21, 2025. Results are shared on the 21 st of reporting months (Jan, Apr, Jul, and Oct), or the next market day if the 21st falls on a Fri, weekend, or holiday. A conference call to review the results is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET on Oct 22, 2025. Interested participants can join by dialing toll-free for the US at 1-833-470-1428, and for Canada at 1-833-950-0062, Access code 142665. A replay will be accessible for thirty days by dialing toll-free for the US at 1-866-813-9403, Access code 156241.

data.title: Bitcoin hits $126K, Strategy's BTC holdings rise. ICE supports Polymarket, Rezolve AI acquires Smartpay, Plume becomes SEC transfer agent.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has surged to over $126,000 as Strategy's holdings of BTC grow. In other news, ICE has announced its support for Polymarket, while Rezolve AI has acquired Smartpay. Additionally, Plume has been granted transfer-agent status by the SEC.

data.title: Apogee Therapeutics closes offering, raises $345M with 8,048,782 shares at $41/share and 365,853 pre-funded warrants.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Apogee Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: APGE) based in San Francisco and Boston, completed an underwritten public offering of its common stock. This offering included 8,048,782 shares of common stock, with an additional 1,097,561 shares sold due to the underwriters exercising their option in full. The public offering price per share was $41.00. Additionally, certain investors received pre-funded warrants to purchase up to 365,853 shares at a price of $40.99999 per warrant with an exercise price of $0.00001 per share. The total gross proceeds generated from the offering amounted to around $345 million for Apogee, prior to deductions for underwriting discounts, commissions, and other related expenses.

data.title: Hingham Savings (NASDAQ: HIFS) reports Q3 2025 results in Hingham, Mass., as of September 30, 2025.
data.description: The Hingham Institution for Savings, located in Hingham, Massachusetts, revealed their financial performance for the quarter ending on September 30, 2025. The institution operates under the NASDAQ symbol HIFS.

data.title: Kikoff and Caribou partner to expand credit and auto refinancing options for millions of consumers.
data.description: In San Francisco, Kikoff and Caribou have joined forces to increase credit and auto refinancing options for a vast consumer base. This strategic partnership aims to benefit millions of individuals seeking improved financial solutions.
